title: Pathrakaliamman Temple
tagline: Pathrakaliamman Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arulmiku Sri Pathirakaliamman temple is one of the antique temples in Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Arulmiku Sri Pathirakaliamman temple is one of the antique temples in Tamil Nadu. It is in Puthiamputhur (Puthimbatore), Tuticorin district. The temple is very familiar to the peoples of the district. We could not able to find out the age of the temple exactly still now.

topPlaces.name: Sillanatham
topPlaces.description: Sillanatham is a neighbourhood in Ottapidaram taluk in Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India.

topPlaces.name: Ottapidaram
topPlaces.description: Ottapidaram is a small town in Thoothukudi district and headquarters of Ottapidaram taluk.

topPlaces.name: Ottapidaram block
topPlaces.description: Ottapidaram block is a revenue block in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 61 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Panchalankurichi Fort
topPlaces.description: Panchalankurichi Fort was a fort once ruled by the polygar Veerapandiya Kattabomman. It was located in what is now the state of Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Governagiri
topPlaces.description: Governagiri is a village in Ottapidaram taluk Thoothukudi District Tamil Nadu India.

topPlaces.name: Karungulam
topPlaces.description: Karungulam is a village in Tamil Nadu, India. There are several villages in the state which share this name; this article is about the village in Thoothukudi district at Vagulagiri hill.

topPlaces.name: Pandarampatti
topPlaces.description: Pandarampatti is a village in Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a population of around 2000.

items.note: Sillanatham is a neighbourhood in Ottapidaram taluk in Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India.

Ottapidaram block is a revenue block in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 61 panchayat villages.
Panchalankurichi Fort was a fort once ruled by the polygar Veerapandiya Kattabomman. It was located in what is now the state of Tamil Nadu in India.
Governagiri is a village in Ottapidaram taluk Thoothukudi District Tamil Nadu India.
Karungulam is a village in Tamil Nadu, India. There are several villages in the state which share this name; this article is about the village in Thoothukudi district at Vagulagiri hill.
Pandarampatti is a village in Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a population of around 2000.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pathrakaliamman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pathrakaliamman Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pathrakaliamman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pathrakaliamman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pathrakaliamman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pathrakaliamman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pathrakaliamman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pathrakaliamman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sillanatham, Ottapidaram, Ottapidaram block, Panchalankurichi Fort, Governagiri.
